title: Serious YouTuber Pack
description: this modpack helps to create content creation easily!
body:
**Basicly A **Content Creator needs** for youtube or other media!**

**only containing _20 mods_ ONLY! and it is one of a kind modpack that helps with content creation the easy way**


**what loader does it use**

it uses fabric loader, and added fabric API in order for all mods to work!

Not always up to date, but im trying to make it that!
